title: Introduction to Java Programming
short_description: Understand what Java is, its features, and why it is widely used.
full_content:
Java is a high-level, object-oriented programming language developed by Sun Microsystems. It follows the principle of Write Once, Run Anywhere.

Step 1: Install JDK
Download and install Java Development Kit.

Step 2: Setup Environment
Set JAVA_HOME and PATH variables.

Step 3: Write First Program
Create HelloWorld.java and print output.

Features:
- Platform Independent
- Object-Oriented
- Secure and Robust

Java is widely used in web, mobile, and enterprise applications.

title: Java Installation Guide (JDK Setup)
short_description: Step-by-step guide to install Java JDK and configure environment variables.
full_content:
Step 1: Download JDK from Oracle website.
Step 2: Install the setup file.
Step 3: Set JAVA_HOME in environment variables.
Step 4: Add bin folder to PATH.
Step 5: Verify installation using java -version.

This setup is required before writing any Java program.

title: Java Hello World Program Explained
short_description: Learn how to write and run your first Java program.

title: Java Variables and Data Types
short_description: Learn about variables and different data types in Java.
full_content:
Java supports primitive and non-primitive data types.

Primitive Types:
- int
- float
- double
- char
- boolean

Step 1: Declare variable
Step 2: Assign value
Step 3: Use in program

Example:
int age = 20;

Variables store data used in programs.

title: Java Operators Explained
short_description: Understand arithmetic, logical, and relational operators in Java.
full_content:
Operators perform operations on variables.

Types:
- Arithmetic (+, -, *, /)
- Relational (==, !=, >, <)
- Logical (&&, ||)

Example:
int sum = a + b;

Operators are essential for calculations and conditions.

title: Java Conditional Statements (if-else, switch)
short_description: Learn decision-making using if-else and switch statements.

title: Java Loops (for, while, do-while)
short_description: Understand looping constructs in Java.

title: Java Arrays Explained
short_description: Learn how to store multiple values using arrays.
full_content:
Arrays store multiple values of same type.

Example:
int arr[] = {1,2,3};

Step 1: Declare array
Step 2: Initialize
Step 3: Access using index

Arrays are used in data storage.

title: Java Strings and String Methods
short_description: Learn how to work with strings in Java.
full_content:
Strings are objects in Java.

Common Methods:
- length()
- toUpperCase()
- charAt()

Example:
String name = "Java";

Used for text processing.

title: Object-Oriented Programming in Java
short_description: Understand OOP concepts in Java.
full_content:
OOP is core of Java.

Concepts:
- Class
- Object
- Inheritance
- Polymorphism
- Encapsulation

Example:
class Car {}

Used in real-world applications.

title: Java Classes and Objects
short_description: Learn how to create classes and objects in Java.

title: Java Constructors Explained
short_description: Understand constructors in Java.
full_content:
Constructors initialize objects.

Types:
- Default
- Parameterized

Example:
Student(int id) {}

Called automatically during object creation.

title: Java Inheritance Explained
short_description: Learn inheritance and its types in Java.
full_content:
Inheritance allows code reuse.

Types:
- Single
- Multilevel
- Hierarchical

Example:
class A {}
class B extends A {}

Improves code reusability.

title: Java Polymorphism Explained
short_description: Understand method overloading and overriding.
full_content:
Polymorphism means many forms.

Types:
- Compile-time
- Runtime

Example:
method overloading

Used for flexibility.

title: Java Encapsulation Explained
short_description: Learn how to protect data using encapsulation.
full_content:
Encapsulation binds data and methods.

Use private variables and getters/setters.

Improves security.

title: Java Abstraction Explained
short_description: Understand abstraction using abstract classes and interfaces.
full_content:
Abstraction hides details.

Use abstract class and interface.

Example:
abstract class Shape {}

Improves design.

title: Java Interfaces Explained
short_description: Learn how interfaces work in Java.
full_content:
Interface defines methods.

Example:
interface Animal {}

Used for multiple inheritance.

title: Java Exception Handling
short_description: Handle errors using try-catch blocks.
full_content:
Exception handling prevents crashes.

Blocks:
- try
- catch
- finally

Example:
try {}
catch(Exception e) {}

Improves program stability.

title: Java File Handling
short_description: Learn to read and write files in Java.
full_content:
File handling is used for data storage.

Classes:
- File
- FileReader
- FileWriter

Used in real applications.

title: Java Collections Framework
short_description: Understand lists, sets, and maps in Java.
full_content:
Collections store groups of data.

Types:
- List
- Set
- Map

Example:
ArrayList

Used in dynamic data handling.

title: Java ArrayList Explained
short_description: Learn how to use ArrayList.
full_content:
ArrayList is dynamic array.

Methods:
- add()
- remove()
- get()

Used in flexible storage.

title: Java HashMap Explained
short_description: Learn key-value storage using HashMap.
full_content:
HashMap stores key-value pairs.

Example:
map.put(key,value);

Used in fast lookup.

title: Java Multithreading Basics
short_description: Learn how to run multiple threads in Java.
full_content:
Multithreading improves performance.

Methods:
- Thread class
- Runnable interface

Used in concurrent applications.

title: Java Synchronization
short_description: Prevent thread conflicts using synchronization.
full_content:
Synchronization controls thread access.

Used in multi-threaded programs.

title: Java Lambda Expressions
short_description: Learn functional programming using lambda.
full_content:
Lambda simplifies code.

Example:
(x) -> x+1

Used in streams.

title: Java Streams API
short_description: Process data using streams.
full_content:
Streams allow functional operations.

Methods:
- filter()
- map()
- collect()

Used for data processing.

title: Java JDBC Connectivity
short_description: Connect Java with databases.
full_content:
JDBC connects Java with DB.

Steps:
- Load driver
- Create connection
- Execute query

Used in backend apps.

title: Java Swing GUI Basics
short_description: Create desktop GUI apps using Swing.
full_content:
Swing builds UI apps.

Components:
- JFrame
- JButton

Used in desktop apps.

title: Java AWT Basics
short_description: Learn GUI programming using AWT.
full_content:
AWT is older GUI toolkit.

Used for basic UI.

title: Java Networking Basics
short_description: Learn socket programming in Java.
full_content:
Networking connects systems.

Classes:
- Socket
- ServerSocket

Used in chat apps.

title: Java Serialization
short_description: Convert objects into byte streams.
full_content:
Serialization stores object state.

Used in file storage.

title: Java Deserialization
short_description: Convert byte stream back to object.
full_content:
Reverse of serialization.

Used in data retrieval.

title: Java Generics Explained
short_description: Write flexible and reusable code using generics.
full_content:
Generics allow type safety.

Example:
List<String>

Improves code quality.

title: Java Annotations
short_description: Understand annotations in Java.
full_content:
Annotations provide metadata.

Example:
@Override

Used in frameworks.

title: Java Reflection API
short_description: Inspect classes at runtime.
full_content:
Reflection analyzes classes.

Used in frameworks.

title: Java Design Patterns Overview
short_description: Learn common design patterns in Java.
full_content:
Patterns improve code structure.

Examples:
- Singleton
- Factory

Used in enterprise apps.

title: Java Singleton Pattern
short_description: Ensure single instance of a class.
full_content:
Singleton restricts object creation.

Used in logging systems.

title: Java Factory Pattern
short_description: Create objects using factory method.
full_content:
Factory pattern creates objects.

Used in frameworks.

title: Java MVC Architecture
short_description: Understand MVC design pattern.
full_content:
MVC separates logic.

Components:
- Model
- View
- Controller

Used in web apps.

title: Spring Boot Introduction
short_description: Build Java backend apps using Spring Boot.
full_content:
Spring Boot simplifies development.

Used in REST APIs.

title: REST API using Spring Boot
short_description: Create REST APIs in Java.
full_content:
Use @RestController.

Build CRUD APIs.

Used in backend systems.

title: Java Microservices Basics
short_description: Build scalable apps using microservices.
full_content:
Microservices split applications.

Used in large systems.

title: Java Memory Management
short_description: Understand heap and stack memory.
full_content:
Memory is managed by JVM.

Garbage collection cleans unused objects.

title: Java Garbage Collection
short_description: Learn how Java manages memory automatically.
full_content:
GC removes unused objects.

Improves performance.

title: Java Best Practices
short_description: Write clean and professional Java code.
full_content:
Use meaningful names.
Avoid duplication.
Follow OOP principles.

Improves maintainability.

title: Java Interview Questions
short_description: Prepare for Java interviews.
full_content:
Common questions:
- OOP concepts
- Collections
- Threads

Useful for job preparation.
